# matillion-streaming_agent (Resource)

Manages a streaming agent definition in DPC

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matillion-streaming_agent" "example" {
  name           = "my-streaming-agent"
  description    = "Example streaming agent"
  deployment     = "fargate"
  cloud_provider = "aws"
}

# Output the computed agent_id
output "agent_id" {
  value       = matillion-streaming_agent.example.agent_id
  description = "The unique identifier of the created agent"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_provider` (String) The cloud provider for the agent. Supported values: aws, azure, gcp. This value cannot be changed after creation.
- `deployment` (String) The deployment type for the agent. Supported values: fargate, eks, aci, aks, gke, gce. This value cannot be changed after creation.
- `name` (String) The name of the agent (1 - 30 characters).

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the agent.

### Read-Only

- `agent_id` (String) The unique identifier of the agent.
